message:
fix(algorithms,convert,python): Dijkstra test correctness, rustfmt, and Box large enum variants

Three improvements across franken_networkx crates:

1. fnx-algorithms: Fix the multi_source_dijkstra_directed test that was
   previously force-failing with assert!(false) and debug println!
   statements. The test now properly asserts that source "b" has
   distance 0.0, successor "c" has distance 1.0, and unreachable
   predecessor "a" is absent from the result map.

2. fnx-convert: Apply rustfmt to test assertions — long method chains
   on edge_attrs/from_edge_list/from_adjacency/digraph_from_edge_list
   are now broken across lines per project style.

3. fnx-python: Box the Owned variants of WeightedGraphProjection and
   WeightedDiGraphProjection enums to reduce enum size on the stack.
   The Graph and DiGraph types are large structs; wrapping them in
   Box<_> when owned avoids inflating the enum to match the largest
   variant, reducing stack pressure in recursive algorithm calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
